General.Name: Teamway International Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Teamway International Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, and sells packaging products and structural components in the Mainland China and Singapore. It operates through Design, Manufacture and Sale of Packaging Products and Structural Components; Trading of Filtration Media, Equipment and Related Accessories for Air Purification; Design, Manufacturing, Sale and Marketing of Rosewood Home Furniture; and Property Investment segments. The company offers expanded polystyrene and polyolefin products for packaging consumer electrical appliances, such as televisions, air conditioners, washing machines, water heaters, refrigerators, information technology, and other products. It also provides rosewood home furniture; trades in filtration media, equipment, and related accessories for air purification; and invests in properties. The company was formerly known as Jin Bao Bao Holdings Limited and changed its name to Teamway International Group Holdings Limited in September 2017. Teamway International Group Holdings Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Tower 6 The Gateway, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
